authoring_method.description: Human-directed low-poly modeling decisions encoded as deterministic first-party geometry; no image-to-3D reconstruction is claimed.
authoring_method.geometry: Manually placed ellipsoids, tapered feather solids, robe volumes, pack volumes, and articulated limb forms.
authoring_method.materials: Seven flat authored color materials derived by visual comparison, without copying source pixels into textures.

modeling_decisions.decision: Use three overlapping tapered tail feathers rooted beneath the robe at tail_base.
modeling_decisions.subject: tail_attachment

modeling_decisions.decision: Use three forward talons per foot with separate dark claws and no recovered hidden rear toe.
modeling_decisions.subject: talon_anatomy

modeling_decisions.decision: Use three rounded wing-hand digits and reserve both canonical item sockets without adding a staff.
modeling_decisions.subject: wing_hands

modeling_decisions.decision: Model a symmetric hidden torso under the robe because the approved references do not expose rear body surfaces.
modeling_decisions.subject: hidden_torso

modeling_decisions.decision: Model the backpack as a main pack, flap, straps, and rolled bedroll attached to torso deformation.
modeling_decisions.subject: backpack

modeling_decisions.decision: Keep the robe, belt, sleeves, beard, beak, face patches, and feather colors as separate bounded material groups.
modeling_decisions.subject: material_groups
